name: Series A
description: Series A floors are soft, silent, and beautiful to walk on, yet ultra-strong and waterproof. With authentic textures, stylish design, and true-to-life detail – Series A makes your hard-wear areas look bright and welcoming.
featuresTitle: WHY CHOOSE A SERIES A FLOOR?

features.title: SOFT & SILENT
features.description: Our Series A floors are soft and silent to walk, play or even dance on.

features.title: WATERPROOF & EASY TO CLEAN
features.description: Just wipe off water and stains and your floor is as good as new.

features.title: LIFETIME WARRANTY
features.description: All Series A floors have a lifetime warranty, so that you can enjoy your floors without worry.
